title: sharpless
description: Smooth, clean, boosted vanilla vibes. Better visibility, better gameplay, zero clutter. Grab it and make your Minecraft look fresh.
body:
## ⭐ sharpless – Smooth & Fresh Default

Sharpless is basically “vanilla, but cleaner”. Soft colors, simple shapes, zero noise. The whole pack focuses on smoothness and clarity, so the game looks fresh while still keeping that classic Minecraft feel.

Everything is minimal, easy on the eyes, and perfect for both survival. Plus, it’s lightweight, so even low-end PCs won’t cry.

## ✨ Features

🔥 Lower fire – PvP-friendly, doesn’t block your whole screen

💎 Ore borders – easy to spot every valuable block

🧼 Smooth, clean look – no distractions, no visual clutter

🚀 Better overall gameplay feel – simple, soft, readable textures

## 🔄 Updates

The pack gets updates all the time.
New Minecraft versions? Covered.
New improvements? Also covered.

Version format:
[x] v1.y.z

x – Minecraft version

y – major update

z – minor fixes

## 🌅 Shaders

Screenshots were taken using Complementary Shaders – Unbound, because they show the smooth style perfectly.

## 🗂️ Other Editions

PvP Edition: 👉 [Click here!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sharpless-pvp)

## 🔐 Permissions

Keep it simple:

❌ Don’t steal or re-upload my textures

❌ Don’t modify the pack and claim it as yours

❌ Don’t include it in modpacks or packs without credit

✔️ If you share it anywhere, always link back to the official page
(Modrinth/CurseForge link – no direct file uploads)
